# Public Data Study Design

## Design
Collect public posts, timestamps, account metadata, engagement counts, captions, links, hashtags, and media hashes where permitted.

## Analysis
- Build coordination graph.
- Build content-similarity graph.
- Compute burst statistics.
- Compare to a timestamp-shuffled null.
- Inspect high-centrality accounts.
- Check disclosure and policy context.

## Output
Use cautious labels: anomaly, suspicious coordination, likely campaign, documented manipulation.
